Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const r=fs.readFileSync\('firestore.rules','utf8'\); const open=\(r.match\(/match \\//g\)||[]\).length; const close=\(r.match\(/^\\s*\\}/gm\)||[]\).length; console.log\('match blocks:',open,'closing braces:',close\); console.log\('Has HRMS attendance:', r.includes\('/attendance/{recordId}'\)\); console.log\('Has leave_applications:', r.includes\('/leave_applications/'\)\); console.log\('Has leave_balances:', r.includes\('/leave_balances/'\)\); console.log\('Has holidays:', r.includes\('/holidays/'\)\); console.log\('Has payslips:', r.includes\('/payslips/'\)\); console.log\('Has isHrmsManager:', r.includes\('function isHrmsManager'\)\);")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node","tsx" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(@\(8080, 9099, 4000, 4400, 4500, 9150\) | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed port $_" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(@\(8080, 9099, 4000, 4400, 4500, 9150\) | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($p\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port $_ : PID $p \($\($proc.ProcessName\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Port $_ : free" } })
